title: rubus × assurgens var. arvinus
intro: Rubus × assurgens var. arvinus, also known as the Arctic raspberry or raspberry, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Rubus genus. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which aid in wound healing and treating skin irritations. The health benefits of Rubus × assurgens var. arvinus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. The plant can be used to make various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and jams, which are often used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
